dates.summary: Anthropic unveiled Project Glasswing, a cybersecurity-focused model developed with Nvidia, Google, AWS, Apple, and Microsoft that reportedly found security flaws across every major operating system and web browser. Google also shipped AI Edge Gallery, an offline app running Gemma models on-device for dictation and other tasks, while ByteDance officially launched Seed 2.0 and previewed Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview. On the infrastructure side, Intel joined Elon Musk’s Terafab AI chip factory effort in Texas, signaling continued vertical integration around AI compute supply.
